display_text: Greater Faerie Fire, Cost: 0: Consumable item that instantly restores 250 health on use. Comes with 3 charges. No mana cost. Used for emergency healing in dangerous situations. Stats: Charges: 3, CD: 10s, Instant Heal: 250 HP.

display_text: Greater Faerie Fire, Cost: 0: Provides +20 damage to your hero while in inventory. This damage bonus is lost when the item is consumed. Offers minor offensive stats alongside its healing utility.

display_text: Greater Faerie Fire, Cost: 0: Timely use can turn around a close fight by providing a sudden health boost to survive burst damage. Can be used while stunned or disabled. Useful for baiting enemies who think you are low health.
